word: G1368 - διϋλίζω - diÿlízō - dee-oo-lid'-zo - Strain at

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to filter through, strain thoroughly, pour through a filter
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1223 and ὑλίζω hulizō (to filter); to strain out. (“strain at” is probably by misprint.): - strain at [prob. by misprint].
